title: podman run faill pulling image
body:
/kind bug **Description** Podman run fails when docker run works. Whole story: My goal is to prepare set of podman commands which replace and fix docker-compose up for this jekyll project: https://github.com/pirati-web/example.pirati.cz First I reduce this docker-compose to single docker comands which works on newly installed fedora 29: 0. `sudo dnf install docker podman` and maybe few other packages 1. turn of selinux 2. [allow innotify watchers](https://github.com/guard/listen/wiki/Increasing-the-amount-of-inotify-watchers) 3. `docker build .` 4. `docker stop running-jekyll && docker rm running-jekyll && docker run --name running-jekyll -it -v "$PWD:/srv/jekyll" -p 4000:4000 -p 35729:35729 -d prahapiraticz_site && docker exec -it running-jekyll sh -c "bundle install --path vendor/bundl&& bundle exec jekyll serve --host 0.0.0.0 --watch --livereload"` First I run into issue with `podmain build .` which was [solved](https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1544#issuecomment-486805411). Then I run into issue with `podman run ...`. **Steps to reproduce the issue:** 1. git clone git@github.com:pirati-web/example.pirati.cz.git 2. podman build . 3. docker run --name running-jekyll -it -v "$PWD:/srv/jekyll" -p 4000:4000 -p 35729:35729 -d prahapiraticz_site **Describe the results you received:** ``` Trying to pull docker.io/library/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0002] Error pulling image ref //prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/prahapiraticz_site: errors: denied: requested access to the resource is denied unauthorized: authentication required Failed Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0004] Error pulling image ref //registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site: manifest unknown: manifest unknown Failed Trying to pull quay.io/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0006] Error pulling image ref //quay.io/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://quay.io/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/prahapiraticz_site: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" Failed Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0008] Error pulling image ref //registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site: name unknown: Repo not found Failed Trying to pull registry.centos.org/prahapiraticz_site...^C[jitka@lopuch praha.pirati.cz]$ cd .. [jitka@lopuch git]$ podman run --name running-jekyll -it -v "$PWD:/srv/jekyll" -p 4000:4000 -p 35729:35729 -d prahapiraticz_site Trying to pull docker.io/library/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0003] Error pulling image ref //prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/prahapiraticz_site: errors: denied: requested access to the resource is denied unauthorized: authentication required Failed Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0004] Error pulling image ref //registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site: manifest unknown: manifest unknown Failed Trying to pull quay.io/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0007] Error pulling image ref //quay.io/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://quay.io/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/prahapiraticz_site: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" Failed Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0008] Error pulling image ref //registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site: name unknown: Repo not found Failed Trying to pull registry.centos.org/prahapiraticz_site...ERRO[0009] Error pulling image ref //registry.centos.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.centos.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.centos.org/prahapiraticz_site: manifest unknown: manifest unknown Failed Error: unable to pull prahapiraticz_site: 5 errors occurred: * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/prahapiraticz_site: errors: denied: requested access to the resource is denied unauthorized: authentication required * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/prahapiraticz_site: manifest unknown: manifest unknown * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://quay.io/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/prahapiraticz_site: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.access.redhat.com/prahapiraticz_site: name unknown: Repo not found * Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.centos.org/prahapiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.centos.org/prahapiraticz_site: manifest unknown: manifest unknown ``` **Describe the results you expected:** No error output, running container. **Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):** Replicated on two different laptops - both with fedora 29. **Output of `podman version`:** ``` Version: 1.2.0 RemoteAPI Version: 1 Go Version: go1.11.5 OS/Arch: linux/amd64 ``` **Output of `podman info --debug`:** ``` Version: 1.2.0 RemoteAPI Version: 1 Go Version: go1.11.5 OS/Arch: linux/amd64 [jitka@lopuch git]$ podman info --debug debug: compiler: gc git commit: "" go version: go1.11.5 podman version: 1.2.0 host: BuildahVersion: 1.7.2 Conmon: package: podman-1.2.0-2.git3bd528e.fc29.x86_64 path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon version: 'conmon version 1.12.0-dev, commit: d88bb0e63cb70f9787a8e410716924f380af361f' Distribution: distribution: fedora version: "29" MemFree: 1235890176 MemTotal: 8030040064 OCIRuntime: package: runc-1.0.0-85.dev.gitdd22a84.fc29.x86_64 path: /usr/bin/runc version: |- runc version 1.0.0-rc6+dev commit: 1d3f73d4086533a858613bc4b6af2b5e882f4730 spec: 1.0.1-dev SwapFree: 8160354304 SwapTotal: 8166305792 arch: amd64 cpus: 4 hostname: lopuch kernel: 5.0.7-200.fc29.x86_64 os: linux rootless: true uptime: 40h 31m 9.94s (Approximately 1.67 days) insecure registries: registries: [] registries: registries: - docker.io - registry.fedoraproject.org - quay.io - registry.access.redhat.com - registry.centos.org store: ConfigFile: /home/jitka/.config/containers/storage.conf ContainerStore: number: 0 GraphDriverName: overlay GraphOptions: - overlay.mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs GraphRoot: /home/jitka/.local/share/containers/storage GraphStatus: Backing Filesystem: extfs Native Overlay Diff: "false" Supports d_type: "true" Using metacopy: "false" ImageStore: number: 8 RunRoot: /tmp/1000 VolumePath: /home/jitka/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes ```

comments.body:
Hi @jitka, thanks for reaching out. It seems the script you're calling is using an image that doesn't exist (i.e., `prahapiraticz_site`).

`docker run --name running-jekyll -it -v "$PWD:/srv/jekyll" -p 4000:4000 -p 35729:35729 -d prahapiraticz_site` will also fail with docker as the image doesn't exist.

The [Dockerfile](https://github.com/pirati-web/example.pirati.cz/blob/master/Dockerfile) from the linked project suggests that the correct image might be `jekyll/jekyll:3.7.3`.

Hi, @vrothberg I can use pure ` jekyll/jekyll:3.7.3.` jekyll package because I need few more dependences. I guess that problem is that `podman build .` doesn`t create image even though it run without error now. ` podman containel ls -a` do not show anything after succesful `podman build .`

Addidng the tag do not solve it:
```
[jitka@kren example.pirati.cz]$ podman build -t name:examplepiraticz_site .
STEP 1: FROM jekyll/jekyll:3.7.3
STEP 2: RUN apk --no-cache add     file     imagemagick
--> Using cache b380d3532994167e2b4866e558e67cfcf38dad436d93db014c3435f971f44a79

--> Using cache 3ab7a858f523ffe32b845120fd756de1a288d4f7c6e5aee8d9be6b5f691cfcea

STEP 6: ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/jekyll/bin/entrypoint"]
--> Using cache 064a319450e4dc9292c22b7f8adf7eb0df1cec38e9526e04d29335f95275d835
STEP 7: FROM 064a319450e4dc9292c22b7f8adf7eb0df1cec38e9526e04d29335f95275d835
STEP 8: WORKDIR /srv/jekyll
--> Using cache 0d9418942862692679efd8ecf21549a9be0338275489718239a66a3582d3857d
STEP 9: FROM 0d9418942862692679efd8ecf21549a9be0338275489718239a66a3582d3857d
STEP 10: VOLUME  /srv/jekyll
--> Using cache 03e5bc832246595027aa961f6d15e92ee042c3d7c3541c222cc41770a6481327

--> Using cache bba5c7bed5a98014bcc7a64cac70a9fa41cd79f3174748efc7ebb53f9ad7ed12

--> f2973786e10cd0e83a5af853cd5b8c6ad78d1f8d48e9b8b06891ae46fcbd16a2
[jitka@kren example.pirati.cz]$ podman image ls -a

<none>                    <none>                 df60024d9032   8 days ago      540 MB

CONTAINER ID  IMAGE  COMMAND  CREATED  STATUS  PORTS  NAMES
[jitka@kren example.pirati.cz]$ podman run --name running-jekyll -it -v "$PWD:/srv/jekyll" -p 4000:4000 -p 35729:35729 -d examplepiraticz_site
Trying to pull docker.io/library/examplepiraticz_site...ERRO[0001] Error pulling image ref //examplepiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://examplepiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/examplepiraticz_site: errors:
denied: requested access to the resource is denied
unauthorized: authentication required
 
Failed
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/examplepiraticz_site...ERRO[0002] Error pulling image ref //registry.fedoraproject.org/examplepiraticz_site:latest: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/examplepiraticz_site:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/examplepiraticz_site: manifest unknow

The reference in the `podman run` call is still wrong. Try it with `localhost/name:prahapiraticz_site` and it should work again.
Yes, I think we can close but feel free to re-open if there are further issues.

Ok. You disapointed me. The tag with build was same as tag with run. When I use those old tag you reccomant resurt is the same.
So this is end of my attempt to use podman, I will continue using docker which works for this containers.

@jitka Did you try what @vrothberg suggested?

```
The reference in the podman run call is still wrong. Try it with localhost/name:prahapiraticz_site and it should work again.
```

@rhatdan yes, I wrote that i did. Result is the same. 

You can try to clone the repo and try it.

`https://github.com/pirati-web/example.pirati.cz`

I wrote jekyll-theme and use containers to build and host sever jekyll web pages. `example.pirati.cz` is minimal examle page, `praha.pirati.cz` one of biggest pages I develop. Both podman and docker works or fails same no mather which of my pages/repos I try. So in this bugreport I am trying tu use exaple.pirati.cz since it is simpler and smaller then other.

Podman and Docker behave identically. And again, it works.

```
$ git clone https://github.com/pirati-web/example.pirati.cz > /dev/null
$ cd example.pirati.cz/
$ podman build -t image:123 . > /dev/null
STEP 1: FROM jekyll/jekyll:3.7.3
STEP 2: RUN apk --no-cache add     file     imagemagick
STEP 3: CMD ["jekyll", "--help"]
STEP 4: ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/jekyll/bin/entrypoint"]
STEP 5: WORKDIR /srv/jekyll
STEP 6: VOLUME  /srv/jekyll
STEP 7: EXPOSE 35729
STEP 8: EXPOSE 4000
STEP 9: COMMIT image:123
$ podman run --name running-jekyll -it -v "$PWD":/src/jekyll -p 4000:4000 -p 35729:35729 -d  image:123
b4544b9a2ee7ee0991c13200975f30f43a3dc9a3cfb91e725cea6e1fd1824558
```

The issue description and following comments simply did not reference the correct image. Take https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/3022#issuecomment-489087351. The image is built as `podman build -t name:examplepiraticz_site .` but the podman-run command references `examplepiraticz_site` instead of `name:examplepiraticz_site`.
